text: {{c1::Quantization}} reduces the precision of model weights and activations to lower memory usage and speed up inference.
explanation: It is one of the most important techniques for serving large models efficiently.
usage: Common in edge devices, mobile apps, and cost-sensitive deployments.
spanish: La cuantización reduce la precisión de los pesos y activaciones del modelo para bajar el uso de memoria y acelerar la inferencia.

text: The {{c1::KV cache}} stores past attention states so autoregressive decoding becomes much faster on repeated tokens.
explanation: It is a critical optimization for chat systems and long-form generation.
usage: Essential in LLM serving and interactive assistants.
spanish: El KV cache almacena estados de atención pasados para que la decodificación autoregresiva sea mucho más rápida en tokens repetidos.

text: Speculative decoding uses a smaller draft model to propose {{c1::tokens}}, which are then verified by the larger model.
explanation: It can sharply reduce latency for high-throughput inference.
usage: Useful for real-time assistants and API serving at scale.
spanish: La decodificación especulativa usa un modelo más pequeño para proponer tokens, que luego son verificados por el modelo grande.

text: Batching groups requests together, while {{c1::pipelining}} overlaps computation and communication to improve throughput.
explanation: These techniques are essential when serving many users under tight latency budgets.
usage: Common in API backends, enterprise copilots, and recommendation systems.
spanish: El batching agrupa solicitudes, mientras que el pipelining solapa cómputo y comunicación para mejorar el throughput.

text: Knowledge {{c1::distillation}} transfers behavior from a larger teacher model to a smaller student model.
explanation: It is a practical way to deploy strong performance with lower cost and latency.
usage: Useful in edge AI, on-device assistants, and mobile applications.
spanish: La destilación de conocimiento transfiere comportamiento de un modelo profesor grande a un modelo estudiante más pequeño.

text: A {{c1::production}} system needs to trade latency, accuracy, and cost carefully because faster models often sacrifice quality.
explanation: This tradeoff is central in real-world AI product design.
usage: Important for SaaS products, internal copilots, and customer-facing assistants.
spanish: Un sistema de producción necesita equilibrar latencia, precisión y costo cuidadosamente porque los modelos más rápidos a menudo sacrifican calidad.

text: Caching can reuse prior computations such as prompt prefixes, {{c1::embeddings}}, or frequent answers to lower cost.
explanation: Good caching can dramatically improve efficiency without changing the model.
usage: Common in high-volume search, support, and customer-facing assistants.
spanish: El caching puede reutilizar cálculos previos como prefijos de prompts, embeddings o respuestas frecuentes para bajar costos.

text: Serving frameworks manage model loading, batching, {{c1::autoscaling}}, and request routing for production workloads.
explanation: The serving layer is often the difference between a demo and a reliable product.
usage: Essential in enterprise AI platforms and scalable APIs.
spanish: Los frameworks de serving gestionan carga de modelos, batching, autoscaling y enrutado de solicitudes para cargas de trabajo de producción.

scenario: Dual-Coding Diagram 📊 (FlashAttention IO-Aware Memory Tiling (Dao et al., 2022))
text: ¿Cómo funciona la estructura de {{c1::FlashAttention IO-Aware Memory Tiling (Dao et al., 2022)}} en el sistema?
explanation:
FlashAttention improves speed by avoiding writing the massive intermediate \(S \times S\) attention matrix back to slow GPU High Bandwidth Memory (HBM). It tiles input matrices into blocks, loads them to fast local SRAM, and computes softmax block-by-block using online updates.

graph LR HBM["High Bandwidth Memory (HBM)
(Slow, Large)"] -- "Load Blocks Q, K, V" --> SRAM["GPU SRAM Cache
(Fast, Small)"] SRAM -- "Compute Softmax Block-by-Block" --> SRAM SRAM -- "Write back Output O" --> HBM
usage:
Visual model for FlashAttention IO-Aware Memory Tiling (Dao et al., 2022).
Graph:
graph LR HBM["High Bandwidth Memory (HBM)
(Slow, Large)"] -- "Load Blocks Q, K, V" --> SRAM["GPU SRAM Cache
(Fast, Small)"] SRAM -- "Compute Softmax Block-by-Block" --> SRAM SRAM -- "Write back Output O" --> HBM
spanish: FlashAttention acelera el cálculo al evitar escribir la enorme matriz de atención intermedia en la memoria lenta HBM de la GPU. Divide en bloques las matrices, las carga en la SRAM local rápida y calcula softmax bloque por bloque.

text: Ecuación para {{c1::KV Cache Memory Footprint}}: \[\text{Size}_{\text{KVCache}} = 2 \times 2 \times B \times L \times H \times d_{\text{head}} \times N_{\text{layers}} \text{ bytes}\]
explanation:
Desglose de variables:
  • \(2\): Factor representing both Key and Value vectors.
  • \(2\): Factor representing 16-bit half-precision float format (2 bytes/weight).
  • \(B\): Inference batch size.
  • \(L\): Maximum sequence length (tokens).
  • \(H\): Key-Value heads count (1 in MQA, \(H_{\text{query}}/G\) in GQA, or equal to query heads in MHA).
  • \(d_{\text{head}}\): Head dimension size.
  • \(N_{\text{layers}}\): Total Transformer layer count.
usage: Formula: \[\text{Size}_{\text{KVCache}} = 2 \times 2 \times B \times L \times H \times d_{\text{head}} \times N_{\text{layers}} \text{ bytes}\]
spanish: Fórmula de KV Cache Memory Footprint
